title: Delimited text box widget(?) that pulls in a board's data
excerpt: I had recently used what I think was a widget or some special part of an app that basically just showed an embedded text box with all of a board’s data in tab delimited text.  I associated it with the Time Reporting Solu…

posts.author: jcyr55 (John Cyr)
posts.cookedHtml:
I had recently used what I think was a widget or some special part of an app that basically just showed an embedded text box with all of a board’s data in tab delimited text. I associated it with the Time Reporting Solution from Omnitas. That board got deleted and I can’t remember how it was created or originated.

Is anyone familiar with this?
